steps.title: Find the comparative signal
steps.content: The underlined portion uses “much like” to create an explicit comparison between the experimental method (color filters on the mantis) and something familiar to readers (3D movie glasses).

steps.title: Match the comparison to the choices
steps.content: The underlined portion's function is to clarify the experimental method by comparing it to something readers likely know. The other choices overlook this explanatory purpose, instead attributing the phrase to describing differences, identifying problems, or chronicling tool history. That matches choice C — C is correct.
